title: AgentDelegation Verifiable Credential
description: A generic Verifiable Credential attesting that the subject AI agent is authorised to act on behalf of the owner DID. Not specific to any vendor or platform.

@context.description: JSON-LD context array. Must include the base W3C VC context.

type.description: Credential type array. Must include 'VerifiableCredential' and 'AgentDelegation'.

id.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (URI).

issuer.description: DID of the issuing party (typically the owner granting the delegation).

issuanceDate.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the credential was issued.

expirationDate.description: Optional ISO-8601 expiry timestamp. Delegation credentials should typically be short-lived.

id.description: DID of the AI agent receiving the delegation.

ownerDID.description: DID of the human or organisation granting the delegation.

delegationScope.description: Scope of the delegation. Examples: read-only, admin, scoped:invoice.create.

delegatedCapabilities.description: Optional list of specific capability names this delegation covers. When absent, the delegationScope applies broadly.

proof.description: Cryptographic proof. When the credential is JWT-encoded, this field is absent.
